query_normalized: evolutionary pressure on alternative splicing in primates biology
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (e) by providing direct evidence of a specific biological mechanism (Alu retrotransposon insertion and dsRNA formation) that drives the evolution of alternative splicing patterns in primates (specifically humans), which is the core subject of the user's question.
